name.description: Name of the field and new csv header to generate

equation.description: A beakscript (lol) string defining the process to calculate this field

name.description: Name of the field and csv header to generate in the teams csv

derive.description: A beakscript string defining the process by which the elements of this set are obtained

avg.description: Creates a field that is the average of this field

max.description: Creates a field that is the max of this field

fil.description: Creates a field that is the filtered average of this field

name.description: Name of the field and csv header to generate in the teams csv

derive.description: A beakscript string defining the process by which the elements of this set are obtained

name.description: This specific name is just to be thorough and is currently hardcoded to Score for the csv

source.description: The header (defined earlier in the YAML or in data-in) name (NOT BKSCRIPT) to pull from to calculate team score (ie. Average vs. Filtered)

name.description: The name of this field and its output csv header

source.description: The particular header name (not beakscript so no '$') from which to source this field
